steps.t: Bolg Maufulug lies to the west and a little north from Talan Fanuidhol. Faelleron has asked you to enter Bolg Maufulug and collect any stolen belongin…
Faelleron is at Talan Fanuidhol, east and a little south of Bolg Maufulug. You should return to Faelleron with the stolen belongings you recovered.
